title: The Egghead Siege Begins
description: On pages 2–4, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Luffy, Unknown person #3, Sanji, Franky as The Egghead Incident accelerates as the Marines surround the island, York’s betrayal surfaces, the Straw Hats regroup, Kizaru arrives, and Saturn approaches.
scene: The Egghead Incident accelerates as the Marines surround the island, York’s betrayal surfaces, the Straw Hats regroup, Kizaru arrives, and Saturn approaches.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Shi- Shish!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Luffy!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Free as can be!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Well, this is a pickle...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Heeey now...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Whoo-hoo!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: BE GENTLE...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ah hya Hya Hya Hya Hya Hya Hya Hya Hya Hya Hya Hya Hya Hya Hya Hya Hya Hya Hya Hya Hya Hya Hya Hya Hya Hya Hya Hya Hya Hya Hya

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: He went flying!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We should use this chance to get outta here!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Yeah, leave Kizaru to Luffy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Where are you going, Atlas?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: To the lower stream, I'm going to override the PacificTA's current objectives!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If I don't, we'll be fried by their lasers the second we drop the barrier.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Good thinking!! Whoever controls the PacificTA will win this fight...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And no one on the island has a higher command authority status than us vegapunks.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just a second, Atlas! I'm coming with you!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You think we're gonna let you go too, old-timer?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The whole point is to keep you alive!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I know... it's just—!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Franky-Kun, come in!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It seems Bonney was knocked down to the lower stratum, can you confirm?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She's survived?! That's great!! Kizaru kicked her face first into the barrier, and--

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How could a strapping young lad like you let that happen to her?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My bad! I'll go help her right away!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Ah... but the barrier's still up...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Hey, this is Sanji!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I want in on this Bonney Rescue Mission!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: 2nd floor, building a

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Veganpunk, I've got everything you asked me to bring aboard.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I'll head to the back exit!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Let's all rendezous there!

summary: This part advances the Egghead Siege Begins through 32 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
